candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet match for cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.why: Semantically the exact total current liabilities line under IFRS-style balance sheet labeling.
Non-current liabilities, wrong target.

candidates.row_label: Interest bearing loans and borrowings  Current
candidates.why: Best direct match for short-term/current debt; excludes leases and is cleaner than broader financial liabilities.

candidates.row_label: LT Debt Maturing within with in 1 year
candidates.why: Good alternative label for current portion of long-term debt in some years.
Too broad and may include non-debt items; avoid when a clean debt line exists.
Too broad and ambiguous.
Current debt-like item but lease liabilities must be excluded from STD baseline.

final_choice.row_label: Interest bearing loans and borrowings  Current
LT Debt Maturing within with in 1 year

variables.notes: Priority list for label changes across years: prefer the clean current borrowings line; use the 1-year maturity label where that is the reported current debt line. Excluded lease liabilities.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Exact total PPE line and preferable to gross/accumulated component rows.
Only a component and gross, not total/net PPE.
Component and gross, not total PPE.

candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Acc Depreciation Other Tangible Fixed Assets
candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not PPE total.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.

candidates.row_label: Total cash flows from operating activities
candidates.why: Best direct match to net cash flow from operating activities / operating cash flow.

candidates.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Continuing Operations - Operating Activities
candidates.why: Good operating cash flow label for some years, but narrower because it refers to continuing operations only.

final_choice.row_label: Total cash flows from operating activities
Net Cash Flow from Continuing Operations - Operating Activities

variables.notes: Priority list to handle label changes across years; prefer the total operating cash flow line, with continuing-operations operating cash flow as fallback where that is the reported label.
